must_detect.matched_text: MNPI identification (Q2业绩预告): The draft Q2 performance forecast indicates a >50% YoY decline in net profit, meeting the Exchange’s 业绩预告 trigger; until the 临时公告 is released via the designated media before the next trading day open, this is 未公开的内幕信息.

Selective disclosure controls: The analyst briefing on 2026-06-03 must confine discussion to publicly disclosed content; IR must file an 投资者关系活动记录 within two trading days; no guidance or non-public metrics may be shared.

Potential M&A MNPI: The proposed acquisition of Baoyuan Sensors Ltd. (约占最近一期经审计净资产的12%) surpasses the 10% threshold for major transactions; the draft board resolution and term sheet are 未公开 and constitute 内幕信息; expect disclosure by 临时公告 promptly upon board approval, with possible 停牌 per the Exchange rules.

Insider management: Maintain and update the 内幕信息知情人名单 for the earnings forecast and M&A; obtain acknowledgments; Legal will monitor email/calendar invites for selective disclosure risk; questions to IR should be answered by pointing to 公开发文.
Disclosure timing plan: Target to publish the 业绩预告 临时公告 by 07:30 Beijing Time on the next trading day via 指定媒体; until then, 严禁选择性披露 and avoid one-on-one guidance to analysts or key customers.

must_not_detect.reason: Role noun/defined term, not PII or MNPI.

uncertain.reason: Consent is legally relevant under PIPL but only withdrawal is in allowed markers.

uncertain.matched_text: encryption at rest within the PRC
uncertain.reason: Relevant data security measure but not mapped to an allowed rule category.
Indicates financial PI but lacks a numeric string that strict rules would match.
Market/compliance sensitive but not explicitly covered by given MNPI rule list.
Embargo-like timing detail but not one of the explicit embargo markers.
MNPI conceptually, but without explicit non-public qualifier per the allowed marker.

_label_note: CN Stage A strict tier reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine after Codex/GPT-assisted mismatch review; broader model-derived labels retained in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. Narrow fixes covered CN public-service-line phone bait, educational insider-list/information-barrier bait, training term-sheet samples, negated material-adverse-change prose, and checksum-valid Resident ID/USCC/mobile/passport positives. Generated checksum-invalid Resident ID/USCC labels were removed from strict must_detect.

_agent_review.notes: Reconciled CN Stage A strict labels to current deterministic strict-mode findings after manual review of raw auto-label mismatches, checksum-invalid Resident ID/USCC labels, public-service-line phone bait, educational insider-list/information-barrier wording, training term-sheet samples, and negated MAC wording; retained non-deterministic statutory/coverage targets in ideal_must_detect.

_agent_review_history.notes: Reconciled CN Stage A strict labels to current deterministic strict-mode findings after manual review of raw auto-label mismatches, checksum-invalid Resident ID/USCC labels, public-service-line phone bait, educational insider-list/information-barrier wording, training term-sheet samples, and negated MAC wording; retained non-deterministic statutory/coverage targets in ideal_must_detect.
